subcodes.first_line: O tranquil souls! Ye are the memorials of that luminous Being and the legacy of that revered Personage, the Khál [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مطمئنه شما یادگار آن ذات منورید و برگذار آن شخص محترم حضرت خال
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
